Official primary sources are not counted as successful collection while credentials are missing: molit_apt_transaction, molit_apt_rent, reb_subscription, onbid_auction. Required env: MOLIT_SERVICE_KEY, ONBID_API_KEY, SUBSCRIPTION_API_KEY.

market_corroboration_requires_official_source 50 official_policy_corroboration 100
